name: Kevin Hostetler
background: Kevin G. Hostetler has served as our Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since April 2022. Prior to joining Array, Mr. Hostetler served as the Chief Executive Officer at Rotork from 2018 to 2022. Prior to that, he served as Chief Executive Officer of FDH Velocitel and held various executive positions at IDEX Corporation and Ingersoll Rand.
